title: Chubb Limited (CB) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Chubb Limited (CB) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript.

title: Compared to Estimates, Chubb (CB) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Chubb (CB) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Chubb (CB) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Chubb (CB) came out with quarterly earnings of $4.41 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $4.37 per share. This compares to earnings of $3.82 per share a year ago.

title: Chubb Reports First Quarter Net Income Per Share of $4.53 Versus $4.55 Prior Year, and Record Core Operating Income Per Share of $4.41, Up 15.1%; Consolidated Net Premiums Written, Up 16.6%, or 18.3% in Constant Dollars, with P&C Up 11.0% and a Combined Ratio of 86.3%
text: Net income was $1.89 billion versus $1.95 billion prior year and core operating income was a record $1.84 billion, up 11.8%. P&C net premiums written were up 9.3%, or 11.0% in constant dollars, with commercial lines up 11.5% and consumer/personal lines up 9.4%.

title: Is a Surprise Coming for Chubb (CB) This Earnings Season?
text: Chubb (CB) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: RLI's Q1 Earnings Top, Revenues Miss, Premiums Rise Y/Y
text: RLI's Q1 results reflect solid performance across all its segments, favorable reserve development and higher net investment income.

title: Chubb Appoints Annmarie Camp North America Business Development Leader
text: WHITEHOUSE STATION, N.J. , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Chubb has appointed Annmarie Camp North America Business Development Leader.
